heading: Decisions and notices of decisions
label: 5104 Decisions and notices of decisions
notes: Prior ProvisionsPrior section 5104 was renumbered .section 8304 of this title

(b) read as follows: “In any case where the Secretary denies a benefit sought, the notice required by subsection (a) shall also include (1) a statement of the reasons for the decision, and (2) a summary of the evidence considered by the Secretary.”Pub. children.label: a
children.text: In the case of a decision by the Secretary under affecting the provision of benefits to a claimant, the Secretary shall, on a timely basis, provide to the claimant (and to the claimant’s representative) notice of such decision. The notice shall include an explanation of the procedure for obtaining review of the decision.section 511 of this title
A summary of the evidence considered by the Secretary.
A summary of the applicable laws and regulations.
Identification of findings favorable to the claimant.
In the case of a denial, identification of elements not satisfied leading to the denial.
An explanation of how to obtain or access evidence used in making the decision.
If applicable, identification of the criteria that must be satisfied to grant service connection or the next higher level of compensation.

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary may provide notice under subsection (a) electronically if a claimant (or the claimant’s representative) elects to receive such notice electronically. A claimant (or the claimant’s representative) may revoke such an election at any time, by means prescribed by the Secretary.
solicit recommendations from stakeholders on how to improve notice under this section; and
publish such recommendations on a publicly available website of the Department.
